name: Baked Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine bread cubes, grated cheese, cubed ham, chopped green bell pepper, and finely chopped onion.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 13x9x2 inch baking dish coated with nonstick spray.
3. Whisk together eggs and milk in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the top of the bread mixture, ensuring it is evenly distributed.
5. Cover the dish with foil.
6. Place the dish in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake for 45 minutes, or until set.
8. Remove from the oven and serve.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
